plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Browse open GitHub issues across your repos (via the gh CLI) or one repo in a searchable, sortable dialog with a repository filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to open and review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: gh CLI + cross-repo, searchable/sortable dialog with a repository filter (All + per-repo), per-field settings help tooltips.

plugins.name: GitHub Pull Requests
plugins.description: Shows up to 5 open GitHub pull requests inline under the session list (via the gh CLI across your repos, or one repo), plus a dialog listing every open PR in a searchable, sortable grid; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Inline Open PRs section + all-PRs dialog, gh CLI or single-repo HTTP. Hardened JSON parsing; per-field settings help tooltips; settings apply live (no restart).

plugins.name: YouTrack
plugins.description: Connect one or more YouTrack instances and browse their open issues per project over the REST API (permanent token); a dialog with instance/project/state filters lets you narrow down, and clicking an issue drops a prompt asking the agent to work on it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Registers the JetBrains remote YouTrack MCP server (/mcp, per configured instance) so a session can query YouTrack via tools. Requires YouTrack Cloud 2026.2+ with the MCP server enabled + a permanent token.
Multiple YouTrack instances; left-menu button opening a dialog with instance/project/state filters (All). Per-field settings help tooltips; no personal instance baked in.
Single-instance per-project open issues over the YouTrack REST API.

plugins.name: Gemini / OpenAI Provider
plugins.description: Adds Gemini and OpenAI as selectable session providers, both over an OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint (Gemini's own OpenAI-compat endpoint, or api.openai.com directly). Configure an API key and model per profile in Manage profiles. Experimental (0.x) — the provider-plugin mechanism is new; live-verify with a real key.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Experimental first provider-plugin (#45 phase A): Gemini + OpenAI via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint over Microsoft.Extensions.AI. Trimmed capability flags; API key redacted from ToString; graceful handling when the provider plugin is missing.

plugins.name: CLI Agent Provider (Codex)
plugins.description: Adds Codex CLI as a selectable session provider, driven as a subprocess per turn (codex exec --json, resumed for follow-up turns). Requires the codex CLI installed and authenticated on the machine running Cockpit. Experimental (0.x, phase B1) — event mapping is a best-effort reconstruction; verify against your Codex version.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Phase B1: Codex CLI subprocess provider through the plugin session-driver contract (process-per-turn, resume, stderr-drain, interrupt=kill). Live Codex schema/auth/resume verification pending (B2).
